description.ko: 회로가 내장된 꽃잎을 가진 프랙탈 꽃들이 피어나는 디지털 정원으로, 기술을 되찾는 자연을 상징합니다.
description.en: A digital garden where fractal flowers bloom with circuit-laden petals, representing nature reclaiming technology.

prompt: A hyper-realistic cinematic shot of FLORA-9, titled 'The Fiber-Optic Bloom.' A futuristic botanical organism featuring translucent #FFB6C1 pale pink petals with embedded #50C878 emerald micro-circuitry and #89CFF0 cyan fiber-optic veins. The plant is rooted in a bed of #4A0E4E deep plum soil consisting of crushed data shards. Shimmering digital pollen floats in the air like glowing pixels. Macro photography focus, Unreal Engine 5 style, bioluminescent glow, 8k resolution, capturing the fusion of organic life and technology.
